default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client accounts and assess their fit/potential using a scoring framework](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Developed a comprehensive client scoring system (1-5 scale) across 18 criteria to evaluate fit and potential](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Highest scoring clients (55+) tend to be more mature companies with adequate resources and realistic expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - Lower scoring clients (\<40) often have mismatched expectations, limited budgets, or overly complex approval processes
  - [Framework provides insights to guide client selection, resource allocation, and potential churn risk](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Topics

### Client Scoring Framework

  - [Created 18-point scoring system on 1-5 scale covering areas like:](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Content complexity (1=expert/credentialed, 5=general)](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Approval layers (1=complex, 5=trusted)](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Revenue/funding stage (1=early, 5=mature)](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [Publishing control (1=gated, 5=full access)](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Total scores range from \~35-60, with higher scores indicating better client fit](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Framework helps identify potential issues early (e.g. mismatched expectations, limited budgets)](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Notable Client Assessments

  - [Engine: High score (58) - trusting relationship, publishing 23 pieces in 7 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Aftershoot: Low score (37) - complex approval process with 3+ reviewers, unrealistic expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Ambit: Challenging but worthwhile (37) - complex content, limited budget, but good collaborators](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Webflow: Patient builders (49) - slow-moving but not pressuring for immediate results](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Client Relationship Insights

  - [Clients scoring 45+ tend to be better long-term fits](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Sub-35 scores often correlate with higher churn risk](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Post-strategy sprint scores of 45-50+ indicate good potential for lasting relationship](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Even challenging clients can be worthwhile if collaborative and aligned on value (e.g. Ambit)](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

### Competitor Benchmarking

  - [Graphite (competitor) quoted $500k/year for strategy only, no content delivery](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)
  - [GrowthX delivering higher volume and quality at \~1/3 the price of top competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)

### Team Capacity and Pricing

  - [Need to better align client expectations with team capacity, especially for lower-priced engagements](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [Consider raising prices or adjusting scope for clients requiring high volume + high quality](https://fathom.video/share/Eecm9-sE9Jvk-9i73QzmzskanMqFmHaG?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
